/usr/bin/ar qc libWWAudio.a CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/AudibleSound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/AudioSaveLoad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/FilteredSound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/Listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/LogicalListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/LogicalSound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/Sound3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/SoundBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/SoundPseudo3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/SoundScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/SoundSceneObj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/Threads.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/WWAudio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/listenerhandle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/sound2dhandle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/sound3dhandle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/soundhandle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWAudio.dir/soundstreamhandle.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libWWAudio.a
